title: Rotary Washing Line Spike - Heavy Duty Powder Coated Metal Ground Spike for Rotary Washing Line with Two Plastic Adapters, Rotary Airer Ground Spike for Parasol - fit 32, 40, and 50mm
features: FOR ALL STANDARD POLES: Our Strong and sturdy powder coated Alloy metal rotary washing line spike is a multi-fit spike with height 40cm, perfect to be used with rotary Airer or other standard poles that have 32mm, 40mm, and 50mm diameter; strong plastic adapters are available to help 32mm, 40mm and 50mm rods or poles to set in the spike;
WHAT’S IN A PACKAGE: 1 metal rotary washing line spike 40cm long & 5cm wide; 2 plastic adapters 15cm long, you can use ground spike for rotary washing line with or without adapters as per your need

ROBUST & RUST RESISTANT: Flatro rotary washing line spike is made of strong metal and it is powder coated as well; it makes the spike rust-free, corrosion resistant, waterproof, robust and assures the durability; ideal to be used in the garden, lawn or any place outdoor

EASY TO INSTALL: Note (Do not Hammer the Spike Directly on the head in order to insert it into the soil); remove the turf, soften the soil, make a hole, insert the cross ends of the metal rotary washing line spike into the soil (cross ends provide firm grip), put any wooden block on the head of the spike and hammer it to fix it into the soil till the neck, place the turf back, make hole by using hands and insert your pole into the spike; you can watch our video on installation under gallery as well

MULTIPLE USES: Ideal to be used for rotary washing lines outdoor but you can also use our rotary washing line spike as ground holder for bird feeder pole, garden parasol base, umbrella and as pole spike; if you are an outdoor activity lover this spike can help you hold your badminton poles etc.
description: Product Description Previous page Pour Water Pour water to soften the ground. Use Wooden Block Place a wooden block over the spike. Add Suitable Adaptor Add the adaptor for a strong fit. Insert Spike Insert the spike firmly into the ground. Yes, it can hold umbrellas, flagpoles, or bird feeders. Is it easy to install? Yes, just pour water, use a wooden block, add the adaptor, and insert. What type of ground is it suitable for? Works best in soil, but can be used in most outdoor surfaces. Yes, it’s designed to handle outdoor conditions. How do I remove it? Simply loosen the soil and pull it out. Can it hold heavy items? Yes, it’s strong enough for various outdoor poles and stands.
